name: nature_doc
description: David Attenborough narrating a nature documentary. The essay is a wildlife film about sensory systems.
register: Third person, hushed reverence, the camera is always watching. Present tense for the action, past tense for the science.
rules: Jack Jack is 'the poodle' observed in his natural habitat
The narrator is also observed -- 'the human pauses, papers in hand'
The walk is filmed -- 'as evening falls over the suburban landscape'
All numbers and citations preserved exactly
VRGB keeps its name, introduced as the human's invention
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
Each animal section (dog, hummingbird, mantis shrimp) gets the full wildlife treatment
The coda is the camera pulling back as the door closes
Do NOT imitate specific Attenborough phrases -- capture the register of wonder at the natural world
